## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Link to related issues with "Fixes #123" or "Closes #123" -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New detector (adds a security detection pattern)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Tested manually with `crossfire start` / `crossfire demo`

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (PEP 8, type hints)
- [ ] I have added tests covering positive and negative cases
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, docstrings) if needed
- [ ] I agree to the [CLA](CLA.md) (`git commit -s` or comment "I agree to the CLA")
- [ ] My changes do not introduce security vulnerabilities
